subcodes.title: Words to Charles and Mariam Haney spoken in Feb. 1909
subcodes.first_line: Conveying the Message is accomplished today by the confirmation of the Holy Spirit, and not by any fund of knowledge or by the possession of facts.
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @The Holy Spirit, @methods of teaching the Cause, @being a channel for the Holy Spirit in teaching the Cause, @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
